title: Turn Messy Thoughts into a Clear, Executable Plan
description: A daily system to convert mental clutter into structured tasks, execute effectively, and improve over time using simple pattern tracking.
what_you_get: Convert mental clutter into clear tasks
Get a realistic daily plan (not overwhelming)
tools: Any Notes App (Notion, Apple Notes, Google Keep, etc.)
before_you_start: This is a daily system, not a one-time tool
Don’t filter your thoughts — dump everything
Save 1–2 key patterns daily in your notes app
Patterns should be short but descriptive (max 50 words)

steps.title: Brain Dump
steps.description: Write everything in your head (tasks, stress, ideas, problems)

steps.title: Include Yesterday’s Patterns
steps.description: Before prompting, add 1–2 patterns from yesterday to give context
steps.example: Yesterday I struggled with: Slept late (3 AM), low energy all day, skipped meals after gym

steps.title: Use Structured Prompt
steps.description: Paste everything into ChatGPT with this prompt
details: Based on this input and past patterns, generate:
4. A realistic plan for today (max 5 tasks)

steps.title: Extract Today’s Plan
steps.description: Keep only 3–5 tasks with clear order and ignore everything else

steps.title: Convert Tasks into Actions
steps.description: Turn each task into a clear action trigger

steps.title: Follow One Rule
steps.description: Do only what’s on the plan and ignore everything else

steps.title: Quick Reflection
steps.description: Review what worked and what didn’t

steps.title: Write 1–2 Descriptive Patterns
steps.description: Store key blockers or behaviors in your notes app (max 50 words each)

steps.title: Use Pattern Templates (Optional but Recommended)
steps.description: Use the structure below to write clearer and more useful patterns

pattern_templates.description: Use these optional templates to write better patterns. This improves clarity and helps generate better suggestions the next day.

formats.name: Cause → Behavior → Impact
examples: Slept at 3 AM → woke up late → low energy and skipped gym
Planned too many tasks → felt overwhelmed → completed only 2 tasks

formats.name: Situation → Mistake → Result
examples: Had free morning time → used phone → wasted 2 hours
Started work without plan → switched tasks frequently → low productivity

formats.name: Pattern Insight
examples: Skipping gym repeatedly → unrealistic daily planning
Late sleep cycle → poor night routine

rules: Focus on cause and effect (what led to what)
Write patterns so they can be reused in tomorrow’s prompt

how_it_works: Each day, store 1–2 patterns in your notes app
Next day, include those patterns in your prompt
AI uses this context to improve suggestions
example_next_day_usage: Yesterday I struggled with: Slept late → low energy → skipped gym
Now here is my brain dump: [today’s input]

pro_tips: Use templates initially, then adapt your own style
variations: Weekly pattern review to identify trends
